ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic region */,
  "scaffold" INTEGER /* Scaffold number of the genomic region */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the genomic region */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the genomic region */,
  "mid" INTEGER /* Midpoint position of the genomic region */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species to which the genomic region belongs */,
  "assembly_version" TEXT /* Version of the genome assembly */,
  "chromosome_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the genomic region */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the genomic region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_regions_scaffold FOREIGN KEY ("scaffold") REFERENCES scaffolds ("scaffold_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic region the data belongs to */,
  "sites" INTEGER /* Total number of sites in the region */,
  "sites_used" INTEGER /* Number of sites used in the analysis */,
  "abba" REAL /* ABBA statistic value */,
  "baba" REAL /* BABA statistic value */,
  "d" REAL /* D statistic value */,
  "fd" REAL /* fd statistic value */,
  "fdm" REAL /* fdM statistic value */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the genomic region */,
  "read_depth" INTEGER /* Read depth of the genomic region */,
  "base_quality" REAL /* Base quality of the genomic region */,
  "num_snps" INTEGER /* Number of SNPs in the genomic region */,
  "num_indels" INTEGER /* Number of indels in the genomic region */,
  "data_generated_date" TEXT /* Date the data was generated or processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES genomic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scaffolds" (
  "scaffold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scaffold */,
  "scaffold_number" INTEGER /* Scaffold number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scaffold */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the scaffold */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the scaffold */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species to which the scaffold belongs */,
  "assembly_version" TEXT /* Version of the genome assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scaffold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator (PI) of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., basic research, clinical study) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_pi_id FOREIGN KEY ("pi_id") REFERENCES p_is ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "p_is" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PI */,
  "pi_name" TEXT /* Name of the PI */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the PI */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the PI belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the PI */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the PI */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the PI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the user */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the access event */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., FASTQ, BAM, VCF) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file for integrity verification */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., raw data, processed data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the project file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the project file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the project file (e.g., CSV, FASTQ, BAM) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the project file for integrity verification */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the project file (e.g., raw data, processed data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, collaborator, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
